basics.name: Jesús Daniel Medina Cruz
basics.label: Senior Android Engineer | Growth Platforms, UI Performance & Mobile Architecture
basics.summary: Senior Android & Mobile Engineer with 10 years of experience building high-performance client applications, product growth platforms, and location-based services. Specialist in Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Coroutines/Flow, and Android SDK internals. Proven track record optimizing user acquisition funnels, UI rendering performance, and client caching strategies that deliver seamless user experiences at scale.

work.name: HansellApp
work.summary: Lead mobile engineering and client UI architecture for a multi-tenant mobile ecosystem.
responsibilities: Improved UI state predictability, rendering performance, and user retention by implementing MVVM architecture with Kotlin Coroutines, Flow, and Jetpack Compose.
Reduced cross-platform feature development time by 34% by architecting a shared business logic layer using Kotlin Multiplatform (KMP), ensuring 100% feature parity.
Accelerated production release frequency by 42% by automating CI/CD build pipelines and establishing automated regression testing.

work.name: Academia Desde0
work.summary: Directed curriculum development at a training platform founded to democratize access to high-quality tech education for Spanish-speaking communities.
responsibilities: Upskilled 20+ developers in modern mobile architecture by designing and delivering a curriculum focused on Kotlin, Compose, and modern architectural patterns.
Decreased bug density in student projects by 30% through the implementation of project-based learning and Test-Driven Development (TDD).
Improved code quality and team collaboration by establishing pair programming, structured code reviews, and agile feedback cycles.

work.name: Bubble
work.position: Senior Android Software Consultant (Growth & High-Scale Systems)
work.summary: Provided hands-on Android engineering, user acquisition optimization, and codebase modernization for high-scale mobile platforms.
highlights: Bitso (Fintech/Growth): Owned SDK integrations and onboarding flows utilizing Kotlin Multiplatform to drive user growth and client engagement.
Dexcom (Medical/Regulated): Championed robust testing practices and SDK development for continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) apps, maintaining 99.94% crash-free sessions.
Beek.io (Mobile Core): Architected a custom cross-platform player SDK using KMP, Ktor, Realm, Jetpack Compose, and SwiftUI for background media streaming.
responsibilities: Engineered client-side caching, background threading, and UI rendering strategies to maximize acquisition conversion rates and app responsiveness.
Spearheaded Android codebase modernization, migrating legacy monolithic codebases into modular Kotlin architectures and reducing technical debt by 31%.
Created custom Gradle plugins to standardize build configurations and automated testing suites across cross-functional engineering teams.

work.name: Insulet Corporation
work.summary: Spearheaded the development of the VIEW app, empowering caregivers to remotely monitor health telemetry in real-time.
responsibilities: Architected high-concurrency, low-latency data processing pipelines for real-time health monitoring, ensuring extreme reliability in high-trust environments.
Reduced memory footprint by 37% and resolved critical threading bottlenecks in the Android domain layer.
Streamlined development of shared platform services, increasing code reuse between mobile platforms using Kotlin and Java.

work.name: Arkusnexus
work.summary: Contributed to cross-platform applications including memory assistants and real-time vehicle telematics for mobility solutions.
responsibilities: Engineered real-time vehicle telematics processing for an insurtech/mobility application, integrating Location Services and location tracking to enable dynamic pricing and boost user acquisition.
Executed a 100% successful architectural migration from React Native to native Android, improving rendering performance and ensuring zero feature regression.

work.name: Compus Sistemas Express
work.summary: Spearheaded digital transformation of enterprise operations by architecting a suite of mobile and web applications.
responsibilities: Boosted development velocity by 24% for internal projects by creating reusable Android SDKs and service clients to standardize data access.

Implemented AST parsing and custom UI tree synchronization layer
Cross-platform support for Android, iOS, Desktop, and WASM
